app.footer: © 2024 EduDisaster Platform. Empowering a disaster-resilient generation.

login.createAccountSubtitle: Join the platform to stay prepared
login.switchToRegister: Don't have an account? Create one
login.errorInvalidCredentials: Invalid credentials for the selected role. Please try again.
login.errorTooManyAttempts: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again in {seconds} seconds.

dashboard.studentJuniorSubtitle: Let's become a Safety Champion! Choose an activity to start.
dashboard.studentJuniorLearnDesc: Read fun stories about how to be safe.
dashboard.studentJuniorDrillDesc: Test your skills in a cool safety game.
dashboard.genericSubtitle: This is your {role} dashboard. Stay informed and prepared.
dashboard.guestSubtitle: You are currently exploring as a guest. You have access to our educational modules, regional hazard maps, and resource videos.
dashboard.guestPrompt: To access personalized features like the AI-powered Virtual Drill Simulator and track your progress, please create an account.
dashboard.guestRegister: Registration is quick, easy, and free!

education.title: Education Modules
education.subtitle: Learn how to stay safe during different types of emergencies. Click on a module to see Do's and Don'ts.

virtualDrill.title: Virtual Drill Simulator
virtualDrill.idleSubtitle: Virtual drills simulate real-life emergencies to test your knowledge in a safe environment.
virtualDrill.generatingSubtitle: Our AI is creating a unique emergency situation for you. Please wait.
virtualDrill.completedSubtitle: Great job! Continuous practice improves your readiness.
virtualDrill.error: Failed to generate a drill scenario. Please try again.

regionalHazards.title: Regional Hazard Map
regionalHazards.subtitle: India has a diverse geography, leading to different disaster risks in different regions. Select your state to see the most common hazards.
regionalHazards.error: Failed to load regional hazard data.

resourceVideos.title: Resource Videos
resourceVideos.subtitle: Watch these videos to learn more about how to stay safe during various emergencies.
resourceVideos.error: Failed to load videos. Please try again later.

chatbot.initialMessage: Hello! How can I help you prepare for a disaster today?
chatbot.error: Sorry, I couldn't get a response. Please try again.
